label: All-In Alex
text: Welcome to Johnny's Saturday Night Game. Cards are in the air and the room is live.

label: British High Roller
text: The high roller clock is running. Blinds are 500 and 1,000, with pressure building quickly.

label: Chipstorm
text: Five minutes remain, stacks are moving, and this turbo level is about to explode.

label: Midnight Mayhem
text: The final table begins now. Every chip matters, and every decision echoes.

label: Queen of Spades
text: Level four is live. Blinds are 200 and 400, and the payout race is heating up.

label: Royal Rumble Riley
text: Another player hits the rail and this final table just got louder! It's down to heads-up with Tim and Joanne!

label: Sunny Stacks
text: Welcome everyone. The clock is live, the blinds are friendly, and the fun starts now.

label: The Pit Boss
text: Rebuys close in one minute. Get your chips right and keep the game moving.

label: Turbo Tony
text: Move it, players. Level five is here and those short stacks are officially sweating.

label: Velvet Dealer
text: Welcome players. Blinds begin at 25 and 50, and your first break arrives in 90 minutes.
